task_description: Conduct a due diligence investigation of Databricks as a potential acquisition target for our enterprise data analytics division.

input_data.context: Our enterprise software conglomerate is considering acquiring Databricks to strengthen our data analytics and AI platform offerings. We need a thorough due diligence report assessing their financials, technology moat, talent, customer base, and any deal risks. The estimated acquisition price range is $35-45 billion.
focus_areas: competitive threats from Snowflake and cloud providers
